tcp_server(3) Library Functions Manual tcp_server(3)

NAME

tcp_server - TCP server state.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/tcp/server.h>

Data Fields


socket_t listen_socket
IPv4 listen socket. socket_t listen_socket6
IPv6 listen socket. atomic_t running
Server running flag (set false to shutdown). tcp_server_config_t config
Server configuration. tcp_client_entry_t * clients
Hash table of connected clients. rwlock_t clients_rwlock
Read-write lock (allows concurrent readers, exclusive writers). tcp_client_cleanup_fn cleanup_fn
Callback for cleaning up client data.

Detailed Description

TCP server state.

Maintains server sockets, client registry, and runtime state.

Definition at line 170 of file include/ascii-chat/network/tcp/server.h.

Field Documentation

tcp_client_cleanup_fn tcp_server::cleanup_fn

Callback for cleaning up client data.

Definition at line 179 of file include/ascii-chat/network/tcp/server.h.

Referenced by tcp_server_destroy(), tcp_server_init(), tcp_server_remove_client(), and tcp_server_set_cleanup_callback().

Hash table of connected clients.
